solution.name: Copilot Pages and Notebooks Compliance Gap Monitor

microsoftSourceClaims.claimText: Microsoft Learn confirms Copilot Pages and Copilot Notebooks compliance capabilities, app-level Conditional Access scope, and current platform limitations for SharePoint Embedded content.
Microsoft Learn requirements guidance confirms .page and .pod storage in a shared user-owned SharePoint Embedded container and clarifies audit naming behavior.
Microsoft Learn Loop compliance guidance confirms shared-container lifecycle behavior, legal-hold rollout language, and Information Barriers boundaries for SharePoint Embedded content.
M365 Roadmap item 561492 reports launched status for review-set indexing and HTML export enhancements, requiring tenant rollout validation before control closure.

licenses: OneDrive license with active OneDrive site for Pages validation users
Microsoft 365 Copilot or Copilot Chat license for Notebook validation users
Purview eDiscovery licensing that supports review and export checks
features: Copilot Pages and Copilot Notebooks enabled for validation scope
Purview eDiscovery case access with review-set permissions
Upstream 06-audit-trail-manager scaffold present for dependency read-back
capacityRequirements: One controlled validation workspace using representative sample data
Read-only command execution access for solution scripts and dependency checks
dataRequirements: No tenant identifiers, selectors, secrets, or customer content in contract evidence
prerequisites.notes: Blocked conditions for this contract include missing licenses, missing roles, missing dependency scaffold, missing audit/retention evidence, and rollout features not yet visible in tenant validation views.

steps.intent: Confirm upstream dependency scaffold for 06-audit-trail-manager is present before regulated gap export review.
steps.expected: Dependency check reports repository-present and no missing dependency flags.

readBack.expectation: dependencyStatus.hasMissingDependencies is false, or execution is marked BLOCKED with evidence.

steps.intent: Validate required licensing and role prerequisites before running compliance checks.
steps.expected: Licenses and roles are documented as present, otherwise disposition moves to BLOCKED.
steps.operatorNote: Record blocked condition if required license, role, or Purview access is missing.

readBack.expectation: Attestation explicitly captures pass/block decision for license and role readiness.

steps.intent: Execute monitor script in WhatIf mode to validate gap-state aggregation and rollout-sensitive status handling.
steps.expected: Output includes validation-required and open gap states without writing tenant data.

readBack.expectation: Gap states and control statuses are returned with no tenant identifiers and no mutation side effects.

steps.intent: Execute evidence export in WhatIf mode to validate package contract behavior and hash path planning.
steps.expected: Export reports package/artifact plan with no generated tenant-bound result file.

readBack.expectation: Output lists planned artifacts and dependency metadata while preserving read-only execution.

steps.intent: Confirm cited Microsoft Learn and roadmap sources remain reachable and aligned with documented claims.
steps.expected: All source claims are marked supported, stale, or blocked with explicit evidence.
steps.operatorNote: Use source verification notes to capture lifecycle and rollout status checks.

readBack.expectation: Each claim has a dated verification decision and evidence reference.

steps.intent: Classify blocked conditions for rollout delay, missing licenses/roles, or no-data limitations without fabricating tenant outcomes.
steps.expected: Blocked disposition is used when rollout or prerequisite evidence is unavailable; no tenant result is produced.
steps.operatorNote: Capture blocked reason as rollout, license, role, or no-data condition with supporting references.

readBack.expectation: Disposition notes explicitly state blocked condition category and supporting evidence path.

steps.intent: Confirm no mutable operation ran during this contract execution.
steps.expected: Cleanup note indicates not-required state for read-only run.
steps.operatorNote: No mutation was executed in this read-only contract.

readBack.expectation: Attestation confirms cleanup is not required because no mutation executed.

requiredArtifacts.description: Transcript from Deploy/Monitor/Export read-only command execution.
Source verification notes for Learn and roadmap claims.
Dependency-state read-back output confirming upstream 06 solution presence.
